series.curator_notes: Primary artist contains the movie Hörspiele (film audio plays) for Kung Fu Panda 1-4 plus a holiday special. These are feature-length adaptations (~90-120 min) divided into chapters. Note: 'Kung Fu Panda - Der Drachenritter' (artist: 4MjNlyWzBgFgnfzr4cTncV) is a separate spinoff series with 11 episodic Hörspiele (Folge 1-11) based on the Netflix series.
